hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭；【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰表示二月份失业增加了进一步降息的理由；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国官员称伊朗正在关键石油路线上埋设地雷。

items.title: Markets' hopes for Fed interest rate cuts are rapidly fading away
items.summary: As both energy prices and inflation fears pop higher, expectations for cuts are sliding lower.
items.title_zh: 市场对美联储降息的希望正在迅速破灭
items.summary_zh: 随着能源价格和通胀担忧的加剧，削减开支的预期正在下降。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran says job losses in February add to the case for more interest rate cuts
items.summary: Miran said in a CNBC interview that the Fed should be focusing more on supporting the labor market than worrying about inflation.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰表示二月份失业增加了进一步降息的理由
items.summary_zh: 米兰在接受 CNBC 采访时表示，美联储应该更多地关注支持劳动力市场，而不是担心通胀。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Officials Say Iran Is Laying Mines in Key Oil Route
items.summary: Iran is using smaller boats, not naval vessels, for the operation in the Strait of Hormuz, an American official said. Israeli airstrikes pounded the Lebanese and Iranian capitals on the 13th day of fighting.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国官员称伊朗正在关键石油路线上埋设地雷
items.summary_zh: 一名美国官员表示，伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的行动中使用的是较小的船只，而不是海军舰艇。以色列空袭在战斗第13天袭击了黎巴嫩和伊朗首都。

items.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin and gold ETFs show sharp flow divergence since Iran war
items.summary: GLD has seen outflows of about 2.7% of assets, while IBIT has seen inflows of around 1.5% of assets since the war erupted, analysts said.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，自伊朗战争以来，比特币和黄金 ETF 显示出巨大的资金流向差异
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，自战争爆发以来，GLD 约有 2.7% 的资产流出，而 IBIT 则约有 1.5% 的资产流入。

items.title: JPMorgan Chase reins in lending to private credit firms after marking down software loans
items.summary: JPMorgan's move shows that the biggest U.S. bank by assets wants to get ahead of potential turbulence involving private credit loans to software companies.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在降低软件贷款后限制向私人信贷公司提供贷款
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通的举动表明，按资产计算，这家美国最大的银行希望在涉及向软件公司提供私人信贷贷款的潜在动荡之前先行一步。

items.title: U.S.-Iran war exposes big market concentration risk. It isn't in S&P 500 stocks
items.summary: Oil prices soar in the U.S.-Iran war, leading to volatility in emerging markets, and showing how concentrated EM funds are in Asian economies.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争暴露了巨大的市场集中风险。它不在标准普尔 500 指数股票中
items.summary_zh: 美伊战争导致油价飙升，导致新兴市场波动，也显示出新兴市场资金在亚洲经济体的集中程度。

items.title: Ground Down by War, Hezbollah’s Loyal Base Shows Cracks
items.summary: “We just want to be back in our homes,” said a Lebanese man who, like many others in the latest round of fighting, has to flee.
items.title_zh: 战争摧毁真主党忠诚基地出现裂痕
items.summary_zh: “我们只想回到自己的家，”一名黎巴嫩男子说，他和最近一轮战斗中的许多其他人一样，不得不逃离。

items.title: Here is what $100 oil means for Bitcoin network
items.summary: Research shows that only 8% to 10% of global Bitcoin hashrate runs in oil-sensitive power markets, suggesting that geopolitical shocks may affect BTC prices more than mining costs.
items.title_zh: 100 美元石油对比特币网络意味着什么
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，全球比特币算力中只有 8% 到 10% 在对石油敏感的电力市场运行，这表明地缘政治冲击对 BTC 价格的影响可能大于采矿成本。

items.title: TON cancels Dubai event over safety concerns in UAE amid Middle East conflict
items.summary: Shortly after the U.S. and Israel launched strikes in Iran, the country attacked the United Arab Emirates with missiles and drones.
items.title_zh: TON 因中东冲突期间阿联酋安全问题取消迪拜活动
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击后不久，该国就用导弹和无人机袭击了阿拉伯联合酋长国。

items.title: Why China can withstand oil's surge past $100 more easily than other countries
items.summary: The latest Middle East tensions sheds light on how the world's three largest oil consumers have taken different approaches to energy, with global consequences.
items.title_zh: 为什么中国比其他国家更容易承受油价突破100美元的考验
items.summary_zh: 最近的中东紧张局势揭示了世界三大石油消费国如何对能源采取不同的态度，并产生了全球后果。

items.title: China says 'thorough preparations' needed as Trump-Xi meeting hangs in the balance amid Iran war
items.summary: China's top diplomat Wang Yi signaled preparations are underway for a planned meeting between the presidents of the U.S. and China.
items.title_zh: 中国表示，特习会在伊朗战争中悬而未决，需要“彻底准备”
items.summary_zh: 中国最高外交官王毅表示，中美两国元首计划会晤的准备工作正在进行中。

items.title: Emirati minister tells BBC Iran must end strikes on Gulf
items.summary: The UAE says more than 1,800 drones and missiles have been projected at the country since the war began.
items.title_zh: 阿联酋部长告诉 BBC 伊朗必须停止对海湾地区的袭击
items.summary_zh: 阿联酋表示，自战争开始以来，已向该国发射了 1,800 多架无人机和导弹。

items.title: Trump’s Iran War Is Causing Problems For His Ally in Italy, Giorgia Meloni
items.summary: War in the Middle East has left Italy’s prime minister in a domestic bind, presenting her with one of the biggest challenges of a previously stable tenure.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的伊朗战争给他的意大利盟友乔治亚·梅洛尼带来了问题
items.summary_zh: 中东战争使意大利总理陷入国内困境，这给她之前稳定的任期带来了最大的挑战之一。

items.title: With New Right-Wing President, Chile Shifts Toward Region’s Conservative, Pro-Trump Alignment
items.summary: The inauguration of Chile’s new president, José Antonio Kast, is the latest milestone in a broader shift toward conservatism and pro-Trump alignment in the region.
items.title_zh: 随着新右翼总统的上任，智利转向地区保守、支持特朗普的联盟
items.summary_zh: 智利新总统何塞·安东尼奥·卡斯特的就职典礼是该地区向保守主义和亲特朗普联盟更广泛转变的最新里程碑。

items.title: Stricter MiCA rules could thin crypto industry across the EU, says Swiss wealth manager
items.summary: Crypto wealth manager Swissborg gets MiCA approval and prepares to move its European operations to France while targeting growth in markets including Germany, Italy and Spain.
items.title_zh: 瑞士财富经理表示，更严格的 MiCA 规则可能会削弱整个欧盟的加密行业
items.summary_zh: 加密货币财富管理公司 Swissborg 获得 MiCA 批准，并准备将其欧洲业务转移到法国，同时瞄准德国、意大利和西班牙等市场的增长。

items.title: Crypto investor turns $50 million into $36,000 in one botched move
items.summary: Aave founder Stani Kulechov said the interface displayed multiple slippage warnings, which the user manually accepted on a mobile device.
items.title_zh: 加密货币投资者一举将 5,000 万美元变成了 36,000 美元
items.summary_zh: Aave 创始人 Stani Kulechov 表示，该界面显示了多个滑点警告，用户可以在移动设备上手动接受这些警告。

items.title: U.S. Senate votes to ban CBDCs in housing bill that may face trouble in the House
items.summary: A bipartisan housing bill was approved in the Senate, carrying an unrelated ban on U.S. central bank digital currencies, but its future remains uncertain.
items.title_zh: 美国参议院投票禁止在住房法案中使用 CBDC，这可能会在众议院面临麻烦
items.summary_zh: 参议院批准了一项两党住房法案，其中对美国央行数字货币实施了无关的禁令，但其未来仍不确定。

items.title: Alleged Ponzi scheme victims sue JPMorgan for banking supposed $328 million scam
items.summary: The proposed class action suit said Chase provided “the essential banking infrastructure” for Goliath Ventures’ alleged fraud, despite red flags it claims made the scheme “obvious.”
items.title_zh: 庞氏骗局受害者起诉摩根大通银行涉嫌 3.28 亿美元诈骗
items.summary_zh: 拟议的集体诉讼称，大通为 Goliath Ventures 涉嫌的欺诈行为提供了“必要的银行基础设施”，尽管它声称存在危险信号，使得该计划“显而易见”。

items.title: Crypto whale loses nearly $50 million swapping USDT for AAVE
items.summary: CoW Swap said the "transaction executed according to the parameters of the signed order" and that "clear price impact warnings" were given.
items.title_zh: 加密鲸鱼将 USDT 换成 AAVE 损失近 5000 万美元
items.summary_zh: CoW Swap 表示，“交易根据已签署订单的参数执行”，并给出了“明确的价格影响警告”。

items.title: Federal judge dismisses Binance terrorism financing lawsuit in Alabama but allows amended complaint
items.summary: The court ordered plaintiffs to file a revised complaint that clearly links defendants’ conduct to the injuries claimed in the lawsuit.
items.title_zh: 联邦法官驳回币安在阿拉巴马州的恐怖主义融资诉讼，但允许修改申诉
items.summary_zh: 法院命令原告提交一份修改后的诉状，明确将被告的行为与诉讼中声称的伤害联系起来。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Palladium Network (PLLD)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #476.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Palladium Network (PLLD)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#476。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #51.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aave (AAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 51。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pi Network (PI)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #38.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pi Network (PI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 38 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 趋势加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #104.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 104。

items.title: Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex
items.summary: Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
items.title_zh: Rakuten 使用 Codex 解决问题的速度提高了一倍
items.summary_zh: Rakuten 使用 OpenAI 的编码代理 Codex 来更快、更安全地交付软件，将 MTTR 降低 50%，自动化 CI/CD 审查，并在几周内交付全栈构建。

items.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
items.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
items.title_zh: Balyasny Asset Management 如何构建用于投资的人工智能研究引擎
items.summary_zh: 了解 Balyasny 如何使用 GPT-5.4、严格的模型评估和代理工作流程构建人工智能研究系统，以大规模转变投资分析。

items.title: Can AI help predict which heart-failure patients will worsen within a year?
items.summary: Researchers at MIT, Mass General Brigham, and Harvard Medical School developed a deep-learning model to forecast a patient’s heart failure prognosis up to a year in advance.
items.title_zh: 人工智能能否帮助预测哪些心力衰竭患者会在一年内病情恶化？
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院、麻省总医院和哈佛医学院的研究人员开发了一种深度学习模型，可以提前一年预测患者的心力衰竭预后。

items.title: New method could increase LLM training efficiency
items.summary: By leveraging idle computing time, researchers can double the speed of model training while preserving accuracy.
items.title_zh: 新方法可以提高LLM培训效率
items.summary_zh: 通过利用空闲计算时间，研究人员可以将模型训练的速度提高一倍，同时保持准确性。

items.title: Lobster buffet: China’s tech firms feast on OpenClaw as companies race to deploy AI agents
items.summary: China-based usage of OpenClaw has already topped that of the U.S., while driving demand for Chinese lower-cost AI models.
items.title_zh: 龙虾自助餐：中国科技公司竞相部署人工智能代理，享受 OpenClaw 盛宴
items.summary_zh: 中国的 OpenClaw 使用量已经超过美国，同时推动了对中国低成本人工智能模型的需求。

items.title: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
items.summary: Modelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.
items.title_zh: 巴西女性告诉 BBC，爱泼斯坦利用模特经纪人招募女孩
items.summary_zh: 巴西女性告诉 BBC，模特经纪人利用企业招募女孩，并安排美国签证去拜访杰弗里·爱泼斯坦。

items.title: Ethereum layer-2 developer OP Labs cuts roles to 'narrow focus'
items.summary: The firm plays a central role in the development of Optimism, an Ethereum layer-2 scaling network designed to make transactions faster and cheaper by processing activity off the Ethereum main chain.
items.title_zh: 以太坊第 2 层开发商 OP Labs 削减职位以“缩小关注范围”
items.summary_zh: 该公司在 Optimism 的开发中发挥着核心作用，Optimism 是一个以太坊第 2 层扩展网络，旨在通过处理以太坊主链之外的活动来使交易更快、更便宜。

items.title: Bitcoin holds $70,000 level as surging oil prices and credit issues have stocks tumbling
items.summary: U.S. President Trump said stopping Iran is more of a concern than oil prices, as crude climbed 10% on Thursday.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升和信贷问题导致股市暴跌，比特币维持在 70,000 美元水平
items.summary_zh: 美国总统特朗普表示，阻止伊朗比油价更令人担忧，周四原油价格上涨 10%。

items.title: Donald Trump memecoin team launches second gala promotion as TRUMP token hits all-time low
items.summary: The promotion follows a similar memecoin-holder dinner last year that drew criticism from lawmakers and watchdog groups.
items.title_zh: 随着 TRUMP 代币跌至历史新低，唐纳德·特朗普 memecoin 团队推出第二次盛大促销活动
items.summary_zh: 此次促销活动是在去年举办的一场类似的模因币持有者晚宴之后进行的，该晚宴引起了立法者和监管机构的批评。

items.title: The Daily: SEC and CFTC sign crypto coordination pact, Ripple launches $750 million share buyback program, and more
items.summary: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.
items.title_zh: 《每日报》：SEC 和 CFTC 签署加密货币协调协议，Ripple 推出 7.5 亿美元股票回购计划等
items.summary_zh: 以下文章改编自 The Block 的时事通讯《The Daily》，该通讯于工作日下午发布。

items.title: CryptoQuant says ETH could fall to $1,500 amid Ethereum’s ‘adoption paradox’
items.summary: ETH could fall further to around $1,500 by the end of Q3 or early Q4 if the current bear market continues, said CryptoQuant’s Julio Moreno.
items.title_zh: CryptoQuant 表示，由于以太坊的“采用悖论”，ETH 可能会跌至 1,500 美元
items.summary_zh: CryptoQuant 的 Julio Moreno 表示，如果当前的熊市持续下去，到第三季度末或第四季度初，ETH 可能会进一步跌至 1,500 美元左右。

items.title: Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI
items.summary: Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale.
items.title_zh: Wayfair 通过 OpenAI 提高目录准确性和支持速度
items.summary_zh: Wayfair 使用 OpenAI 模型来改善电子商务支持和产品目录准确性，自动进行票证分类并大规模增强数百万个产品属性。

items.title: From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment
items.summary: How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state.
items.title_zh: 从模型到代理：为 Responses API 配备计算机环境
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用响应 API、shell 工具和托管容器构建代理运行时，以使用文件、工具和状态运行安全、可扩展的代理。

items.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
items.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.
items.title_zh: 改善前沿法学硕士的教学层次
items.summary_zh: IH-Challenge 训练模型以优先考虑可信指令，改善指令层次结构、安全可操纵性以及对即时注入攻击的抵抗力。

items.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
items.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.
items.title_zh: Codex 安全性：现在处于研究预览阶段
items.summary_zh: Codex Security 是一款 AI 应用程序安全代理，可分析项目上下文，以更高的置信度和更少的噪音来检测、验证和修补复杂的漏洞。

items.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
items.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
items.title_zh: Descript 如何实现大规模多语言视频配音
items.summary_zh: Descript 使用 OpenAI 模型来扩展多语言视频配音，优化含义和时间的翻译，使配音的语音在不同语言中听起来都很自然。

items.title: How NVIDIA AI-Q Reached \#1 on DeepResearch Bench I and II
items.title_zh: NVIDIA AI-Q 如何在 DeepResearch Bench I 和 II 上达到第一名

items.title: PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!
items.title_zh: PRX 第 3 部分 — 在 24 小时内训练文本到图像模型！

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: An overview of SpeciesNet, our open-source AI model that is helping people around the world protect and conserve wildlife.
items.title_zh: 我们的开源人工智能模型 SpeciesNet 如何帮助促进野生动物保护
items.summary_zh: SpeciesNet 概述，我们的开源人工智能模型正在帮助世界各地的人们保护野生动物。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in February
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from February 2026
items.title_zh: 我们二月份公布的最新人工智能新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 2 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite：专为大规模智能而打造
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 是我们迄今为止速度最快、最具成本效益的 Gemini 3 系列型号。

items.title: Google and the Massachusetts AI Hub are launching a new AI training initiative for the Commonwealth.
items.summary: Google is partnering with the Massachusetts AI Hub to provide every Baystater with no-cost access to Google’s AI training.
items.title_zh: 谷歌和马萨诸塞州人工智能中心正在为联邦启动一项新的人工智能培训计划。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在与马萨诸塞州人工智能中心合作，为每个 Baystater 提供免费的谷歌人工智能培训机会。

items.title: Get more context and understand translations more deeply with new AI-powered updates in Translate.
items.summary: New alternatives, “understand” and “ask” buttons in Google Translate help you navigate the complexities of natural language.
items.title_zh: 通过 Translate 中全新的人工智能驱动的更新，获取更多背景信息并更深入地理解翻译。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译中的新替代方案“理解”和“询问”按钮可帮助您应对自然语言的复杂性。

items.title: 3 Questions: Building predictive models to characterize tumor progression
items.summary: Assistant Professor Matthew Jones is working to decode molecular processes on the genetic, epigenetic, and microenvironment levels to anticipate how and when tumors evolve to resist treatment.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：建立预测模型来表征肿瘤进展
items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Matthew Jones 致力于解码遗传、表观遗传和微环境水平上的分子过程，以预测肿瘤如何以及何时进化以抵抗治疗。

items.title: How Joseph Paradiso’s sensing innovations bridge the arts, medicine, and ecology
items.summary: From early motion-sensing platforms to environmental monitoring, the professor and head of the Program in Media Arts and Sciences has turned decades of cross-disciplinary research into real-world impact.
items.title_zh: Joseph Paradiso 的传感创新如何架起艺术、医学和生态学的桥梁
items.summary_zh: 从早期的运动传感平台到环境监测，这位教授兼媒体艺术与科学项目的负责人将数十年的跨学科研究转化为现实世界的影响。

items.title: Improving AI models’ ability to explain their predictions
items.summary: A new approach could help users know whether to trust a model’s predictions in safety-critical applications like health care and autonomous driving.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能模型解释其预测的能力
items.summary_zh: 一种新方法可以帮助用户知道是否信任模型在医疗保健和自动驾驶等安全关键应用中的预测。

items.title: Surging oil prices could wipe out benefits from Trump's 'big beautiful bill'
items.summary: Estimates from Wall Street project that if oil prices stay elevated for too long, consumers will lose as much as they gain from the new tax law.
items.title_zh: 油价飙升可能会消除特朗普“大而美丽的法案”带来的好处
items.summary_zh: 华尔街的估计表明，如果油价长期保持高位，消费者从新税法中得到的损失将与他们从新税法中获得的收益一样多。

items.title: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能会对另一个能源市场造成比石油更严重的打击
items.summary_zh: 全球大约20%的液化天然气流经该海峡。

items.title: Robinhood's venture fund, which gives investors access to private companies, tanks 11% on first day
items.summary: Robinhood's Venture Fund I plunged 11% in its debut on the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, casting doubt on investors' appetite for riskier investment.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 的风险基金为投资者提供投资私营公司的机会，首日股价下跌 11%
items.summary_zh: Robinhood 的 Venture Fund I 周五在纽约证券交易所首次亮相时暴跌 11%，这让投资者对风险投资的兴趣产生了怀疑。

items.title: Iran's new supreme leader vows to block Strait of Hormuz in first statement
items.summary: A message attributed to Mojtaba Khamenei also says Iran will continue targeting US bases in the region.
items.title_zh: 伊朗新任最高领导人在首次声明中誓言封锁霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊发布的消息还称，伊朗将继续针对美国在该地区的基地。

items.title: Rapper-politician Balendra Shah's party wins Nepal election
items.summary: The Rastriya Swatatantra Party has won a large majority in an election dominated by issues including corruption.
items.title_zh: 说唱歌手政治家巴伦德拉·沙阿的政党赢得尼泊尔大选
items.summary_zh: 斯瓦塔坦特拉党在腐败等问题主导的选举中赢得了多数席位。

items.title: Israeli military drops charges against soldiers accused of abusing Palestinian detainee
items.summary: The Israeli military's top lawyer cites "exceptional circumstances" for dropping the case involving a Palestinian man held at Sde Teiman military prison.
items.title_zh: 以色列军方撤销对被指控虐待巴勒斯坦被拘留者的士兵的指控
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方高级律师以“特殊情况”为由，撤销了涉及关押在斯德泰曼军事监狱的一名巴勒斯坦男子的案件。

items.title: France's ghost car scandal that allowed one million illegal vehicles onto the roads
items.summary: Fake dealerships were manipulating the state vehicle licensing agency's official records, France's auditor has found.
items.title_zh: 法国幽灵汽车丑闻导致100万辆非法车辆上路
items.summary_zh: 法国审计员发现，假冒经销商正在操纵国家车辆许可机构的官方记录。

items.title: Parents accused of hiding daughter's HIV infection and neglect
items.summary: The child did not see a doctor until she was six - and had not had any vaccinations, Italian media say.
items.title_zh: 父母被指控隐瞒女儿的艾滋病毒感染情况和忽视
items.summary_zh: 意大利媒体称，这个孩子直到六岁才去看医生，而且也没有接种任何疫苗。

items.title: China approves 'ethnic unity' law requiring minorities to learn Mandarin
items.summary: The law states that children should be taught Mandarin before kindergarten, until the end of high school.
items.title_zh: 中国批准《民族团结法》要求少数民族学习普通话
items.summary_zh: 法律规定，孩子们应该在幼儿园前接受普通话教育，直到高中毕业。

items.title: Nineteen jailed over deadly Moscow concert attack
items.summary: Gunmen opened fire at Crocus City Concert hall near Moscow in 2024, killing 149 and injuring more than 500.
items.title_zh: 十九人因莫斯科音乐会袭击事件被判入狱
items.summary_zh: 2024 年，武装分子在莫斯科附近的克洛库斯市音乐厅开枪，造成 149 人死亡、500 多人受伤。

items.title: Noma head chef resigns from restaurant amid abuse allegations
items.summary: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.
items.title_zh: 诺玛餐厅主厨因虐待指控而辞职
items.summary_zh: 雷内·雷泽皮 (René Redzepi) 此前曾在这家丹麦餐厅的前雇员指责他创造了有毒的工作环境后道歉。

items.title: Iran’s Frantic Attempt to Save Its Ships Before Torpedo Attack
items.summary: The Iranian Navy sought refuge in Sri Lanka and India. While India obliged, Sri Lanka stalled over fears it would threaten its neutrality.
items.title_zh: 伊朗在鱼雷袭击前疯狂尝试拯救船只
items.summary_zh: 伊朗海军前往斯里兰卡和印度寻求庇护。尽管印度有义务这样做，但斯里兰卡却因担心这会威胁到其中立性而停滞不前。

items.title: How Russia’s Scorched-Earth Attacks Put Ukraine’s Power Grid Near Collapse
items.summary: Strikes on Ukrainian energy systems have tripled this winter. Continuous repairs and Western aid staved off a total breakdown.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯的焦土袭击如何导致乌克兰电网濒临崩溃
items.summary_zh: 今年冬天，乌克兰能源系统遭受的袭击增加了两倍。持续的维修和西方的援助避免了彻底崩溃。

items.title: Trump Tempers María Corina Machado’s Political Ambitions in Venezuela
items.summary: President Trump is tempering the political ambitions of María Corina Machado, a Nobel laureate, as he deepens ties with her foes in Venezuela.
items.title_zh: 特朗普缓和玛丽亚·科里娜·马查多在委内瑞拉的政治野心
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统正在缓和诺贝尔奖获得者玛丽亚·科里娜·马查多的政治野心，同时加深了与委内瑞拉敌人的关系。

items.title: China Wants Its Ethnic Minorities to Blend In. Now It’s the Law.
items.summary: Under a new “ethnic unity” law, Mandarin Chinese must now be the language of teaching. Parents must guide their children to love the Communist Party. Neighborhoods should be mixed.
items.title_zh: 中国希望少数民族融入社会。现在是法律。
items.summary_zh: 根据新的“民族团结”法，普通话现在必须成为教学语言。家长要引导孩子热爱共产党。社区应该是混合的。

items.title: Israel Drops Case Against Soldiers Accused of Abusing Palestinian Detainee
items.summary: After a prisoner arrived at a hospital with broken ribs and a torn rectum, Israelis were once again at odds over the issue of mistreatment and impunity.
items.title_zh: 以色列撤销对被指控虐待巴勒斯坦被拘留者的士兵的指控
items.summary_zh: 在一名肋骨骨折、直肠撕裂的囚犯被送往医院后，以色列人再次在虐待和有罪不罚问题上产生分歧。

items.title: Pardoning Netanyahu Now Would Be Improper, Key Israeli Office Says
items.summary: Rebuffing pressure from President Trump, a legal office says the prime minister should be pardoned only if he resigns, confesses or is convicted.
items.title_zh: 以色列重要办公室称现在赦免内塔尼亚胡是不合适的
items.summary_zh: 一家法律办公室顶住了特朗普总统的压力，表示只有辞职、认罪或被定罪，才应赦免总理。

items.title: SEC's advisory group backs tokenized securities push, outlines how to keep it safe
items.summary: The committee that steers the U.S. securities regulator on investor issues voted to support a new effort to regulate stock transactions on blockchains.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会的咨询小组支持代币化证券的推广，并概述了如何保证其安全
items.summary_zh: 指导美国证券监管机构处理投资者问题的委员会投票支持监管区块链股票交易的新举措。

items.title: Donald Trump to hold another Mar-a-Lago lunch for his token holders
items.summary: The U.S. President will be the keynote speaker at a "gala luncheon" for the top 297 holders of the $TRUMP token.
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普将为其代币持有者再次举办海湖庄园午餐
items.summary_zh: 美国总统将在为 $TRUMP 代币前 297 名持有者举办的“盛大午宴”上发表主旨演讲。

items.title: The Emperor has no wallet
items.summary: Why crypto still hasn’t solved a single everyday problem, argues VerifiedX’s Pollak.
items.title_zh: 皇帝没有钱包
items.summary_zh: VerifiedX 的 Pollak 认为，为什么加密货币仍然没有解决任何一个日常问题。

items.title: CFTC to set ‘rules of the road’ for prediction markets, Chair Selig says
items.summary: Prediction markets platforms like Kalshi and Polymarket are seeing record trading volumes and valuations near $20 billion each.
items.title_zh: 主席塞利格表示，美国商品期货交易委员会 (CFTC) 将为预测市场制定“道路规则”
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 和 Polymarket 等预测市场平台的交易量和估值均创历史新高，均接近 200 亿美元。

items.title: Lido cleans up Earn offering, rolls outs first stablecoin vault with USDT and USDC
items.summary: Lido is consolidating its Earn offering into EarnETH and EarnUSD, the latter of which represents its first stablecoin vault.
items.title_zh: Lido 清理了 Earn 产品，推出了第一个包含 USDT 和 USDC 的稳定币金库
items.summary_zh: Lido 正在将其 Earn 产品整合为 EarnETH 和 EarnUSD，后者代表了其第一个稳定币金库。

items.title: Lawsuit claims JPMorgan Chase accounts served as ‘exclusive vehicle’ in $328 million crypto ponzi
items.summary: JPMorgan allegedly served as the “exclusive vehicle” for a $328 million crypto Ponzi, funneling $253 million into Goliath Ventures.
items.title_zh: 诉讼称摩根大通账户充当价值 3.28 亿美元的加密货币庞氏骗局的“独家工具”
items.summary_zh: 据称，摩根大通充当了价值 3.28 亿美元的加密货币庞氏骗局的“独家工具”，向 Goliath Ventures 注入了 2.53 亿美元。

items.title_zh: 在 AI 模式下使用 Canvas 即可在搜索中完成工作并将您的想法变为现实。
